description: Style NoteVersatile and effortlessly stylish, these olive-green  trousers from indigo nation will make a hard-working addition to your casual wardrobe. Based on the laid-back weekend mood, this piece exudes authentic cool thanks to its stylish rugged look and various pockets. Wear with a casual shirt or t-shirt and trekking shoes to face the great outdoorsProduct DetailsOlive green trousers that have a flat front, two insert pockets on the sides with mock flap detail, two patch pockets, both on the thigh area and at the back with buttoned closures, loops on the waisband with a metal zip and buttoned closure on the waist and extendible hemsMaterial and Fit100% cottonMachine wash cold at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry low and dry inside out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height:6' and waist:32") is wearing a size 32
